title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

Pada Masa Itulah Musik Indonesia Mengalami Perkembangan Yang Pesat Dengan Berbagai Genre Dan Gaya, Mulai Dari Pop, Rock, Hingga Dangdut Dan Balada.
👉 Pengantar Lagu Lawas || Indonesia Tahun 80an:Lagu Ini Merupakan Salah Satu Lagu Balada Yang Sangat Terkenal Dengan Kandungan Yang Mendalam Tentang Cinta Dan Kesakitan.

基本的に中日の試合を全試合配信しています🐉

基本的に12球団OKの配信になっています。
何処の球団を応援していても大丈夫ですねので
自分の好きな球団をたくさん応援してください！

※配信上の注意※

来ていただければ「こんりん」と挨拶をしてくれると嬉しいです！

様々な方が見ているので過度な球団批判や選手は批判はご遠慮下さい
ブロック対象になります。
基本は「タイムアウト」や「削除」で対応します
行き過ぎてる人や削除やタイムアウトの回数が多い人は『ブロック』させて頂きます。

他の配信者さんのお名前を出すのもお控えください。
※トラブル防止の為※

リスナーさん同士の私的な会話はお控えください
ここは皆で野球を楽しむ場なので私的な会話がしたければ
個人同士でお願いします！(身内ノリみたいなのも控えて下さい)

個人的にこの人のコメント合わないなとか思われたりしたら
個人でブロックして対処お願いします！
自分の楽しいコメント欄に自分でしていきましょう！！

【緋撃燐の野球関係】
父親が阪神ファンでその影響で阪神のファンです。
コロナがきっかけでプロ野球を見始めたのでまあまだ野球初心者なので温かい目で見て頂けると幸いです！
2021年は阪神の試合を143試合見ていました！
やっていたポジションは
キャッチャー、ショート、センターでした！
キャッチャー目線で色々話すかもです！

【なんで中日を見てるの？】
今シーズンから同時視聴配信を始め、色んな球団を見ていたら
中日ファンに囲まれて気づけば中日の試合を専門で見るようになりました。

【阪神中日戦はどっち応援してるの？】
中日です。理由は中日が負けるとリスナーさんが皆悲しんでしまうので…

・中日1軍戦全試合

・オールスターやWBCなどのシーズン途中イベント

https://discord.gg/yNUS9W6a8K

▼ドズル社×LEVEL∞ コラボPC
https://www.pc-koubou.jp/pc/game_dozle.php

▼みんなへ

ども！ドズルです！

概要欄からこんにちは！
こんなところまでチェックしてくれて、ありがとうございます。

ドズル社のことをもっと知りたい！！！って概要欄をひらいてくれたのかな？
そんなあなたに、伝えたいメッセージを書きます！

ドズル社はみんなの「人生というゲームをもっと楽しく」することを目的に活動しています。
僕たちのコンテンツを通じて、たくさん笑顔になってくれると嬉しいです。
みんなのゲームに登場する愉快なキャラクターになれていますか？


応援の方法もたくさんあります。
動画を見る、コメントする、グッズを買う、イベントに参加する、
ドズル社を話題にする、おすすめする、イラストを描く、切り抜きをする。

そのすべてが僕たちのパワーになって、みんなのおかげで楽しく活動できています！
本当にいつもありがとう！！！


ただ、一つだけ約束してください。
応援しすぎて、疲れないように！！！
みんなに楽しんでもらうために活動しているので、応援しすぎて疲れちゃうのは本末転倒です。

自分のペースで、ゆるーくながーく応援してくださいね。
それが一番うれしいです。

今日、動画を見てくれた人が、
明日も、来週も、来年も、10年後も見たくなるような動画を作りつづけたい！

全部の動画を見なくてもいいです。
たまに動画を見てくれるだけでも、本当に嬉しいです。
好きな時に、ふらっと動画を見にきてください。


ドズル社は新しいチャレンジをして、アップデートします。
将来どんなことができるか、ワクワクです。
一緒にドズル社の変化を楽しみながら、人生というゲームを楽しみましょう！


ドズルより

BGM courtesy of https://www.epidemicsound.com/

description:

・ILLUSTRATION Oda Kogane
https://x.com/oda_koden

・調声 yasai31
https://x.com/yasai31_

・offvocal 
しばし


君と見ていた景色は
「だjァご羅e異バ薇ｸ利」
イカれたその記憶を目にし、
飾る故意はメディシン
息が詰まるような縁
魔反対で荒削り
形を比べたならあっちゅう間
実際のところそれ何分間？

- アアアアア　-
君の心手に取るように
判る、けど換わるわテクノロジー
乾いく着飾るドレスのように
誰かの言葉がこちらを呼ぶ

言語(げんご)
言語(ごんご)
「今度…」
ﾄﾞﾓ
戻らない永遠

どうにもなりたくないのに
羽が生えてる
左がいないのに
枯れたお花にもする水やり
水差すなよ
本当はやりたくないのに
もがき苦しみ演じるアイドリング
それでも言う
うちらもうバラバラか？？？

救われる方法ひとつじゃないのに？
無駄に生きている君のアイコニック
戻りたけりゃ戻れる
その覚悟があるなら
「全部投げ捨てても求めたいのに」
「全部が拾えてもやらないのに」
なんか…
これって
それって
無駄な会話

「」

《プロフィール》

アソビシステムのアイドルプロジェクト「KAWAII LAB.」より2024年8月デビュー。

メンバーは、古澤里紗、佐野愛花、板倉可奈、増田彩乃、川本笑瑠、梅田みゆ、真鍋凪咲、桜庭遥花の8名。 数ヶ月にわたって、パフォーマンス審査やオーディション合宿が行われ、今回の8名が集められた。インフルエンサー、女優、アイドル、ダンサー、学生など異なるバックグラウンドを持ったメンバーが、それぞれの経験を活かしながらアイドルグループとして活動していく。

グループ名には、「どんな私（CUTIE）にもなれる、どんなところ（STREET）へだって行ける」、彼女たちにも、彼女たちと一緒にいる人たちにも、“なりたい自分”を見つけて欲しいという想いが込められた。

グループのコンセプトは、“KAWAII MAKER”。年齢も経歴も異なる8人のメンバーが“KAWAII MAKER”として、彼女たちの生み出した“KAWAII”を原宿から世界へ発信していく。

・古澤里紗（熊本県出身 / 2000.11.8生まれ）
・佐野愛花（東京都出身 / 2000.11.26生まれ）
・板倉可奈（千葉県出身 / 2001.11.11生まれ）
・増田彩乃（愛知県出身 / 2003.5.26生まれ）
・川本笑瑠（神奈川県出身 / 2002.4.22生まれ）
・梅田みゆ（熊本出身 / 2004.9.13生まれ）
・真鍋凪咲（神奈川出身 / 2004.6.28生まれ）
・桜庭遥花（北海道出身 / 2006.1.29生まれ）

title: 東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ - Paradise Has No Border / THE FIRST TAKE
tags: the first take|firsttake|ファーストテイク|ふぁーすとていく|一発撮り|TFT|音楽|東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ|スカパラ|すかぱら|TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA|Paradise Has No Border|パラダイスハズノーボーダー|ぱらだいすはずのーぼーだー
description:
「THE FIRST TAKE」は、一発撮りのパフォーマンスを鮮明に切り取るYouTubeチャンネル。

第651回は、日本が世界に誇るスカバンド・東京スカパラダイスオーケストラが再び登場。
今回披露するのは、スカのリズムに乗せて“境界線なき楽園”を高らかに歌い上げる代表曲「Paradise Has No Border」。
数々の著名人とのコラボレーションで話題となり、国内外のフェスやライブで幾度となく観客を熱狂させてきた本楽曲を、メンバー9人だけで繋いでいく圧巻のスペシャルパフォーマンスで一発撮り。

Episode 651 welcomes back TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA, a world-class ska band from Japan.
For this time around, they will perform “Paradise Has No Border,” blasting out their signature track over a ska beat. The song has generated significant buzz through collaborations with numerous celebrities and has set crowds on fire at festivals and shows both in Japan and abroad.
Enjoy this spectacular one-shot performance by the nine members as the spotlight passes from one to the next.

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

title: Yami Safdie, Alejandro Sanz - Cuéntame (Video Oficial)
tags: Yami Safdie Alejandro Sanz Cuentame|Cuentame Video Oficial|Yami Safdie 2026|Alejandro Sanz 2026|Cuentame Letra|Cuentame Lyrics|Pop en Español 2026|Alejandro Sanz Musica Nueva|Yami Safdie Oficial|Cuentame Audio|Balada Pop 2026|Yami Safdie Alejandro Sanz Letra|Yami Safdie|Alejandro Sanz|Cuentame
description:
Yami Safdie, Alejandro Sanz - Cuéntame (Video Oficial)

"Cuéntame" es el esperado encuentro musical entre la frescura generacional de Yami Safdie y la maestría emocional de Alejandro Sanz. En esta balada pop latina, ambos artistas se sumergen en una conversación honesta y cercana que explora la curiosidad que nace al conocer profundamente a la persona que amamos.

Con una letra que transita desde lo cotidiano, como el nombre de una mascota o un libro favorito, hasta los anhelos más profundos, la canción captura ese instante donde la verdadera intimidad comienza con una simple pregunta. La calidez vocal de Yami se entrelaza con la intensidad característica de Sanz para recordarnos que, a veces, el acto más romántico es simplemente querer escucharlo todo.

Escucha *Cuéntame* en todas las plataformas digitales: https://WML.link/Cuentame-YamiSafdiexAlejandroSanz

description:

ADVERTENCIA! - Que encontraras en Jardred?

En Jardred encontrarás vídeos de Minecraft cuidadosamente preparados y guionizados, creados con el único propósito de ofrecer historias entretenidas para el público. El contenido está dirigido a toda la familia: aunque los personajes son caóticos y las situaciones pueden ser intensas, nunca se transmiten mensajes negativos a la audiencia. Todo está pensado para entretener tanto a los más pequeños como a los más mayores.

El canal se inspira en múltiples creadores de la plataforma de YouTube, pero siempre con un enfoque propio y original, buscando que cada historia tenga una identidad única que no pueda encontrarse en ningún otro canal. Publicamos contenido diario de Minecraft en formato largo y Shorts, pensado para todo tipo de público.

PERSONAJES:

JARDRED
Una calabaza viviente caótica, con cambios de humor constantes. Al mínimo enfado recurre a la dinamita para hacerlo volar todo por los aires, aunque intenta controlar sus impulsos. Adora a los gatos y, aunque no lo admita, es muy miedoso con todo lo relacionado con el terror. Aprecia profundamente a sus amigos, aunque rara vez lo demuestra, prefiriendo expresar su cariño a través de bromas extremas y situaciones absurdas.

MAURICIO
El aldeano principal y más conocido de la aldea. Es el acompañante habitual de Jardred en casi todas sus aventuras, aunque a menudo termina agotado por su comportamiento y necesita tiempo a solas. Le apasionan los negocios y ganar dinero; su pasatiempo favorito es jugar en el ordenador. Trabaja diariamente organizando y distribuyendo las tareas entre los aldeanos del reino.

PABLO
El único aldeano que viste una túnica blanca. Es un científico apasionado por la naturaleza y los animales, siempre experimentando, aunque muchas veces sus pruebas acaban en situaciones inesperadas. A pesar de su pasado tímido, ahora no tolera que nadie se burle de él y siempre está dispuesto a ayudar a sus amigos cuando se encuentran en problemas.

ALMUDENA
La única aldeana que viste una túnica rosa. Es la líder de los ejércitos de la aldea, aunque actualmente dispone de más tiempo libre desde que el Rey Aldeano ha comenzado a sustituir el ejército tradicional por agentes de policía bajo su mando. Tiene un carácter fuerte y autoritario, y no soporta que le lleven la contraria cuando sabe que tiene razón.

JARD
El clon malvado de Jardred. En el pasado fue la criatura más poderosa de Minecraft, capaz de corromper y controlar mundos y criaturas a su antojo. Actualmente vive en la aldea con solo una pequeña parte de sus antiguos poderes, intentando llevar una vida normal. En esta nueva etapa, se encuentra estudiando programación.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

description:
🏆 17H 26/03 - 29/03: TRỰC TIẾP PUBG GLOBAL SERIES 2 VỚI 24 ĐỘI TUYỂN HÀNG ĐẦU THẾ GIỚI

⭐ 12 Đội Tuyển Đối Tác Toàn Cầu
🔹 Việt Nam: 🇻🇳 Anyone's Legend
🔹 Châu Mỹ: 🇺🇸 Team Falcons
🔹 Trung Quốc: 🇨🇳 17Gaming, 🇨🇳 Four Angry Men, 🇨🇳 Petrichor Road
🔹 EMEA (Châu Âu, Trung Đông và Châu Phi): 🇺🇦 Natus Vincere, Twisted Minds, 🇪🇺 Virtus.pro
🔹 Hàn Quốc: 🇰🇷 DN SOOPers, 🇰🇷 Gen.G Esports
🔹 Thái Lan: 🇹🇭 eArena, 🇹🇭 FULL SENSE

⭐ 12 Đội Tuyển Được Mời
🔹 PUBG Vietnam Series (Việt Nam): 🇻🇳 FINHAY CERBERUS, 🇻🇳 The Expendables
🔹 PUBG Americas Series (Châu Mỹ): 🇧🇷 FURIA, 🇺🇸 Team Liquid
🔹 PUBG Champions League (Trung Quốc): 🇨🇳 Change The Game, 🇨🇳 JD Gaming
🔹 PUBG EMEA Championship (EMEA): 🇹🇷 S2G Esports, Team Vitality
🔹 PUBG Weekly Series (Hàn Quốc): 🇰🇷 Crazy Raccoon, 🇰🇷 T1
🔹 PUBG Thailand Series (Thái Lan): 🇹🇭 Made in Thailand, 🇹🇭 Theerathon Five

🔥 Xem chi tiết thể thức thi đấu PUBG Global Series 1 tại đây: https://pubgesports.com/vi/news/9803
━━━━━━━━━━

🏆 THỂ THỨC PUBG GLOBAL SERIES 2 (PGS 2)

⭐ Nhánh Thắng (17h 26/03): 16 đội đứng đầu PGS 1 thi đấu 5 trận.
🔹 8 đội đứng đầu → Tiến thẳng vào Vòng Chung Kết (8 đội này sẽ Nhận Điểm Lợi Thế ở Vòng Chung Kết)
🔹 8 đội xếp cuối → Rơi xuống Vòng Sinh Tồn

⭐ Vòng Sinh Tồn (17h 27/03): 16 đội (8 đội xếp cuối PGS 1 + 8 đội xếp cuối Nhánh Thắng) thi đấu 5 trận.
🔹 8 đội đứng đầu → Lọt vào Vòng Chung Kết

Hi vọng chúng ta sau này cùng tìm thấy đúng người yêu ta hết một đời
Từ nay phải quên em thôi, phải quên thôi...

description:
RU NỬA VẦNG TRĂNG - GIỌNG CA DỊU DÀNG NGHE RẤT CUỐN ► Trúc Linh Bolero (Official MV 4K) 
💃 Thưởng thức liên khúc Rumba Bolero sến xưa ngọt ngào và sâu lắng, với giọng ca truyền cảm của ca sĩ Trúc Linh - người mang đến phong cách hát nhẹ nhàng, da diết và đậm chất hoài niệm.
Cùng với hình ảnh người mẫu xinh đẹp, đầy đặn và giai điệu bolero bất hủ, video sẽ đưa bạn trở về không gian âm nhạc mộc mạc, gần gũi của những năm tháng yêu thương xưa cũ.

🌹 Trúc Linh Bolero hân hạnh giới thiệu đến quý khán giả những liên khúc nhạc vàng, bolero, rumba trữ tình chọn lọc, nơi giọng hát Trúc Linh hòa cùng âm thanh mộc mạc, tạo nên những phút giây thư giãn và lắng đọng tâm hồn.

👉 Dành tặng cho những ai yêu thích nhạc sến xưa, bolero trữ tình, rumba quê hương, và đặc biệt là những khán giả luôn dõi theo giọng hát Trúc Linh Bolero - người giữ lửa cho dòng nhạc xưa đầy cảm xúc.

🔔 ĐĂNG KÝ & BẬT CHUÔNG để không bỏ lỡ những liên khúc bolero sến xưa chọn lọc mỗi ngày.
❤️ Nếu bạn yêu thích video, hãy nhấn Like và bình luận vài lời để ủng hộ Trúc Linh Bolero nhé!

২০২৬ সালে প্রচারিত ঈদের বিশেষ ইত্যাদির দুর্দান্ত সব আয়োজনের একটি ছিলো দুই ভুবনের দুই জনপ্রিয় তারকার একসঙ্গে গান। চলচ্চিত্র তারকা শবনম বুবলী এবং বর্তমান সময়ের জনপ্রিয় সংগীত শিল্পী ইমরান মাহমুদুল। পেশাদার সংগীতশিল্পী না হয়েও পেশাদার শিল্পী ইমরানের সঙ্গে খুব চমৎকারভাবে গানটি গেয়েছেন বুবলী। অভিনয়ে জনপ্রিয় বুবলীর টিভিতে গাওয়া এটিই প্রথম গান। বলা যায় এই গানটির মাধ্যমেই বুবলীর গায়িকা হিসেবে আত্মপ্রকাশ। অর্থাৎ ইত্যাদির মাধ্যমে নায়িকা বুবলী গায়িকা হলেন।

Performed live by Sami Yusuf and Atif Aslam at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi in November 2025, ‘Mast Qalandar’ is a celebrated qawwali of the Indian subcontinent, deeply rooted in centuries of Sufi tradition. The piece is based on a devotional poem attributed to the renowned Sufi poet and musical pioneer Amir Khusro, later expanded and enriched by the verses of the great Punjabi mystic Bulleh Shah. Its lyrics express reverence (not worship) for Ali ibn Abi Talib—who holds central importance in Sufi spiritual lineage—and pay tribute to the revered 12th-century saint Lal Shahbaz Qalandar of Sindh.

Equally central to ‘Mast Qalandar’ is its powerful musical structure. Built on the traditional qawwali form, the piece unfolds through dynamic call-and-response passages, rhythmic handclaps, and a gradual intensification of tempo and energy. Driven by harmonium, sitar, percussion, and layered vocals, the music creates a state of spiritual elevation, where repetition and improvisation draw both performers and listeners into a shared experience of ecstasy. This intricate interplay between melody, rhythm, and vocal expression is what gives the qawwali its enduring emotional and spiritual impact.

Widely popularized in the modern era by Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, ‘Mast Qalandar’ has become one of the most iconic expressions of Sufi musical tradition, embodying themes of spiritual love and transcendence.

Performed brilliantly here by two contemporary musical icons.

Vocalists: Atif Aslam and Sami Yusuf

FALA, BRUXÕES DE MEIA TIGELA E FANSHITS QUE NÃO RECEBERAM A CARTA DE HOGWARTS! ⚡🦉

A HBO soltou o trailer da nova série de Harry Potter e a internet já está pegando fogo! O motivo da vez? A escolha do ator Paapa Essiedu para interpretar o icônico e sombrio Severo Snape. Tem gente amando, tem gente surtando, e claro que a gente veio gravar aquela nossa reação marota pra dar pitaco nessa polêmica toda! 🐍💥

Mas aí fica a grande dúvida que paira no ar de Azkaban: com tanta bagunça acontecendo no estúdio, será que a gente REALMENTE prestou atenção e viu o trailer?! 🤔😂

Pra começar a sessão de caos, tiramos um tempo para abrir os bizarros e maravilhosos Presentes dos FanShits! Vocês não têm limites, e a gente adora isso! 📦🎁

E pra fechar o caixão (ou o armário sob a escada) com chave de ouro enferrujada, Ricardo ataca novamente com um de seus cospobres lendários. Dessa vez, ele encarnou o inigualável HARRY PODRE! 🤡👓 O cara veio com uma cicatriz torta de canetão na testa e prometeu fazer uma MÁGICA REAL no meio do estúdio. O nível de vergonha alheia foi tão grande que o Rodrigo quase usou um Avada Kedavra nele ali mesmo! 🤬

Vem rir da nossa desgraça, ver os presentes da galera e descobrir se a gente viu ou não o bendito trailer!

👇 Comenta aí: O que você achou da escolha do novo Snape? E de 0 a 10, qual o nível de vergonha do "Harry Podre" do Ricardo?

⚡ SINOPSE DA SÉRIE (HARRY POTTER - HBO):
Uma adaptação original e fiel dos amados livros de J.K. Rowling. A nova série da HBO promete explorar o universo bruxo com um nível de profundidade e detalhes inédito, acompanhando uma nova geração de atores interpretando Harry, Rony e Hermione durante seus anos na Escola de Magia e Bruxaria de Hogwarts. Planejada para durar uma década, a produção trará à vida os mistérios, as amizades e a épica batalha contra Lord Voldemort de uma forma que os fãs nunca viram.

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: Gameplay Trailer | The Expanse: Osiris Reborn
tags: The Expanse|Osiris Reborn|Expanse|Xbox|Xbow Partner Preview|sci-fi|RPG|action RPG|third person|Expanse beta|Expanse release date|space
description:
Today, the newest gameplay trailer for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, an upcoming Sci-Fi Action RPG, has been revealed at the Xbox Partner Preview.

The beta test for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn will begin in 4 weeks, on the 22nd of April 2026. Beta access will be available to Founders who purchased Miller’s Pack or the Collector’s Edition. The Beta will include a full mission from the beginning of the game, during which the players will visit Pinkwater 4 station, meet some of its many residents, including Zafar, who will later join their crew, confront a powerful enemy, and earn themselves the title of captain. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn Beta will be available on PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, and PlayStation 5. Since this is Beta and the game is in the works, performance may vary depending on the hardware and does not reflect the final quality. On consoles, we recommend playing the Beta on Xbox Series X and PlayStation 5 for the smoothest experience.

The Expanse: Osiris Reborn will be released in spring 2027, on PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG), Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 5, and will also be available on Xbox Game Pass from Day 1.

description:
After months of speculation and a closely guarded casting process, a new generation of Harry, Ron and Hermione is preparing to return to Hogwarts. 

HBO has released the first teaser trailer for its upcoming Harry Potter television series, confirming a premiere date of Christmas 2026.

The two-minute preview offers a first look at Dominic McLaughlin as Harry Potter, alongside Arabella Stanton as Hermione Granger and Alastair Stout as Ron Weasley. 

The trio, cast following an extensive open search for British actors aged nine to 11, will lead the series across multiple seasons in near real time.

title: 7 Things HBO’s Harry Potter Trailer Got WRONG (BREAKDOWN)
tags: Harry Potter|HBO Harry Potter|Harry Potter series|Harry Potter TV series|Harry Potter reboot|Harry Potter trailer|Harry Potter trailer breakdown|trailer reaction|Harry Potter theory|Harry Potter explained|Wizarding World|Hogwarts|Harry Potter news|HBO original|fantasy series|TV series|coming soon|Snape|Severus Snape|Paapa Essiedu|black Snape|Snape casting|Snape controversy|harry potter teaser|hbo|hbo max|harry potter|teaser|breakdown|easter eggs
description:
Hey everyone, welcome to another installment of Harry Potter Theory.

The first thing that I want to get out of the way here is that I DID actually enjoy the trailer. I don’t know what I expected, but it exceeded those expectations, so I just want to make it clear that these are OBJECTIVE criticisms. I’ve already done a breakdown video as well as a video full of some fun easter eggs, so make sure to check those out if you haven’t already.

Alright, on to the things that were ‘wrong’.

Before we go any further, I do feel the need to clarify what “wrong” actually means. Because not everything that’s different from the books is automatically wrong.

There are a few different ways something can fall into this category.

First, you have direct contradictions—things that are described a certain way in the books, and the show does completely different.

Then we’ve got  missing details—smaller things that are clearly established in the books, but just don’t show up (at least from what we can tell).

And finally, we have additions—things that were never in the books at all, that the show has decided to introduce.

Now, again—none of this necessarily ruins anything. Some of these changes might even end up being improvements.

But if they’re going to advertise as book-accurate, we might as well hold them accountable by pointing out a couple of shortcomings. Again, on the whole I think they did a good job, but these are the things that stood out to me.

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: Gameplay Trailer | The Expanse: Osiris Reborn
tags: The Expanse|Osiris Reborn|Expanse|Xbox|Xbow Partner Preview|sci-fi|RPG|action RPG|third person|Expanse beta|Expanse release date|space
description:
Today, the newest gameplay trailer for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, an upcoming Sci-Fi Action RPG, has been revealed at the Xbox Partner Preview.

The beta test for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn will begin in 4 weeks, on the 22nd of April 2026. Beta access will be available to Founders who purchased Miller’s Pack or the Collector’s Edition. The Beta will include a full mission from the beginning of the game, during which the players will visit Pinkwater 4 station, meet some of its many residents, including Zafar, who will later join their crew, confront a powerful enemy, and earn themselves the title of captain. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn Beta will be available on PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, and PlayStation 5. Since this is Beta and the game is in the works, performance may vary depending on the hardware and does not reflect the final quality. On consoles, we recommend playing the Beta on Xbox Series X and PlayStation 5 for the smoothest experience.

The Expanse: Osiris Reborn will be released in spring 2027, on PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG), Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 5, and will also be available on Xbox Game Pass from Day 1.

Become a Founder to support the game’s development, gain a $10 discount on digital packs (the discount is already included in the price), and earn exclusive digital rewards.

description:
l’amour excuse tout, il croit tout, il espère tout, il supporte tout.
‭‭1 Corinthiens‬ ‭13‬:‭7‬ ‭ 

Dans un monde où tout devient jetable, No Way nous rappelle une vérité essentielle : l’amour véritable ne fuit pas au premier conflit. Cette chanson est un appel à la loyauté, à la fidélité et à la persévérance dans le couple, même quand les tempêtes se lèvent. Parce qu’aimer, ce n’est pas seulement rester quand tout va bien… c’est surtout choisir de rester quand tout devient compliqué. 

Que le Seigneur conduise chacun de nos couples et nous aide à persévérer dans l’amour commandos.

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. title: Gameplay Trailer | The Expanse: Osiris Reborn
tags: The Expanse|Osiris Reborn|Expanse|Xbox|Xbow Partner Preview|sci-fi|RPG|action RPG|third person|Expanse beta|Expanse release date|space
description:
Today, the newest gameplay trailer for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, an upcoming Sci-Fi Action RPG, has been revealed at the Xbox Partner Preview.

The beta test for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn will begin in 4 weeks, on the 22nd of April 2026. Beta access will be available to Founders who purchased Miller’s Pack or the Collector’s Edition. The Beta will include a full mission from the beginning of the game, during which the players will visit Pinkwater 4 station, meet some of its many residents, including Zafar, who will later join their crew, confront a powerful enemy, and earn themselves the title of captain. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn Beta will be available on PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, and PlayStation 5. Since this is Beta and the game is in the works, performance may vary depending on the hardware and does not reflect the final quality. On consoles, we recommend playing the Beta on Xbox Series X and PlayStation 5 for the smoothest experience.

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

title: La série « Harry Potter » tient sa première bande-annonce (avec son lot de nostalgie)
tags: harry potter|harry potter serie|série harry potter|série harry potter bande annonce|série harry potter hbo|série harry potter trailer|harry potter bande annonce|harry potter bande annonce 2025|harry potter 2026|harry potter hbo|harry potter trailer|harry potter trailer vf|bande annonce|bande annonce harry potter serie|hbo|hbo harry potter|hbo max harry potter|hbo max har
description:
« Expecto... bande-annonce ! » La première saison ne sortira pas avant Noël 2026, mais HBO a prévu de quoi calmer l’impatience des fans. Une première bande-annonce (à voir plus bas) a été dévoilée ce mercredi 25 mars pour la nouvelle série Harry Potter. Ces images donnent un aperçu du reboot (aussi attendu que critiqué) de la saga sur le plus célèbre des sorciers. 

La saison 1 correspondant au premier roman, Harry Potter à l’École des sorciers, on découvre donc Harry, Ron et Hermione lors de leur arrivée à Poudlard. Costumes, décors, ambiance… tout est similaire en tout point au film sorti en 2001. Mais les jeunes acteurs Dominic McLaughlin, Alastair Stout et Arabella Stanton ont remplacé Daniel Radcliffe, Rupert Grint et Emma Watson.

공허 관리인 그림자 군도 녹서스 다르킨 대장장이 데마시아 룬 마법사 마법공학기계 빌지워터 사슬파괴자 수확자 슈리마 시간의 수호자 아이오니아 어둠의 아이 영겁 영혼결속자 요들 용족 이쉬탈 자운 타곤
프렐요드 필트오버 흡수자 균열의 재앙 기동타격대 기원자 난동꾼 대식가 방해꾼 별의 창조자 불멸자 비전 마법사 세계의 종결자 엄호대 여사냥꾼 영웅 우두머리 원거리 사격 전쟁기계 초월체 총잡이 토벌자
파수꾼 학살자 황제

[챔피언]
럼블 룰루 브라이어 블리츠크랭크 비에고 소나 쉔 애니비아 일라오이 자르반 4세 진 케이틀린 코그모 키아나 그레이브즈 니코 렉사이 바드 바이 뽀삐 사이온 신 짜오 아펠리오스 애쉬 야스오 에코 오리아나 요릭
초가스 트리스타나 트린다미어 트위스티드 페이트 티모 갱플랭크 그웬 노틸러스 다리우스 드레이븐 레오나 로리스 르블랑 말자하 문도 박사 밀리오 베인 세주아니 아리 조이 징크스 케넨 코부코와 유미 가렌 나서스
니달리 다이애나 럭스 레넥톤 리산드라 미스 포츈 베이가 벨베스 브라움 세라핀 스웨인 스카너 신지드 암베사 오공 요네 워윅 유나라 카이사 칼리스타 타릭 피즈 협곡의 전령 T-헥스 갈리오 루시안과 세나 멜
볼리베어 세트 쉬바나 쓰레쉬 아지르 아트록스 애니 오른 제라스 직스 질리언 킨드레드 탐 켄치 피들스틱 내셔 남작 라이즈 브록 사일러스 아우렐리온 솔 자헨

[아이템]
죽음의검 죽검 거인학살자 거학 밤의 끝자락 밤끝 피바라기 마법공학 총검 쇼진의 창 스테락의 도전 무한의 대검 인피 붉은 덩굴정령 레드 거인의 결의 거결 루난의 허리케인 구인수의 격노검 스태틱의 단검
내셔의 이빨 최후의 속삭임 덤불 조끼 가갑 가고일 돌갑옷 크라운가드 수호자의 맹세 수맹 굳건한 심장 굳심 용의 발톱 이온 충격기 적응형 투구 저녁갑주 수은 라바돈의 죽음모자 라죽모 데캡 대천사의 지팡이
모렐로노미콘 보석 건틀릿 보건 푸른 파수꾼 블루 구원 정의의 손길 정손 워모그의 갑옷 방패파괴자 방파 타격대의 철퇴 도적의 장갑 도장 전략가의 왕관 강철의 솔라리 펜던트
도박꾼의 칼날 라이트실드 문장 루덴의 폭풍 리치베인 마나자네 마법사의 최후 망령 해적검 무한한 삼위일체 방한 장갑 생선대가리 선체분쇄자 속임수 거울 수상한 외투 승천의 부적 역병의 보석 영원한 겨울
영혼의 형상 은빛 여명 자객의 발톱 저격수의 집중 존야의 역설 죽음불꽃 손아귀 죽음의 저항 지평선의 초점 추적자의 팔목 보호대 타락한 흡혈의 낫 활력증진의 펜던트 황금 징수의 총

description:
HBO представил первый тизер сериала о Гарри Поттере, премьера которого ожидается ближе к Рождеству. Судя по кадрам, проект будет более реалистичным и ближе к книге — с большим вниманием к жизни Гарри до Хогвартса. Однако обсуждения сразу вышли за рамки самого тизера. Главный скандал разгорелся вокруг актёра, исполняющего роль Снейпа — фанаты спорят о кастинге, а сам актёр уже столкнулся с угрозами. Кинокритик Ораз Керейбаев рассказывает, каким может получиться новый «Гарри Поттер», почему его уже сравнивают с фильмами, и что вызывает наибольшие споры у зрителей.

title: Gameplay Trailer | The Expanse: Osiris Reborn
tags: The Expanse|Osiris Reborn|Expanse|Xbox|Xbow Partner Preview|sci-fi|RPG|action RPG|third person|Expanse beta|Expanse release date|space
description:
Today, the newest gameplay trailer for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, an upcoming Sci-Fi Action RPG, has been revealed at the Xbox Partner Preview.

The beta test for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn will begin in 4 weeks, on the 22nd of April 2026. Beta access will be available to Founders who purchased Miller’s Pack or the Collector’s Edition. The Beta will include a full mission from the beginning of the game, during which the players will visit Pinkwater 4 station, meet some of its many residents, including Zafar, who will later join their crew, confront a powerful enemy, and earn themselves the title of captain. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn Beta will be available on PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, and PlayStation 5. Since this is Beta and the game is in the works, performance may vary depending on the hardware and does not reflect the final quality. On consoles, we recommend playing the Beta on Xbox Series X and PlayStation 5 for the smoothest experience.

The Expanse: Osiris Reborn will be released in spring 2027, on PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG), Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 5, and will also be available on Xbox Game Pass from Day 1.

Become a Founder to support the game’s development, gain a $10 discount on digital packs (the discount is already included in the price), and earn exclusive digital rewards.

title: Хоттабыч | Трейлер | В кино с 1 января
tags: aladdin|disney|russia|хоттабыч|джинн|джинни|маг|гэндальф|приключения|восточная сказка|сказка|москва|россия|ближний восток|домовенок кузя|чебурашка|буратино|по щучьему велению|волшебник изумрудного города|простоквашино|сказка о царе салтане|аладдин|русалочка|дисней|моана|трейлер
description:
В КИНО С 1 ЯНВАРЯ

Волька, непросто переживающий развод родителей, случайно освобождает заколдованного джинна Хоттабыча, который мечтает стать человеком и найти свою дочь. Жизни двух героев неожиданно связываются одной «волей» — и теперь им вместе предстоит разобраться со своими желаниями, обрести настоящих друзей, сразиться с могущественным колдуном из прошлого, и самое сложное — повзрослеть.

В роли неустрашимого волшебника Гассана Абдуррахмана ибн Хоттаба Фёдор Бондарчук.

Главные роли в «Хоттабыче» исполняют Надежда и Анна Михалковы, Аскар Ильясов, Полина Денисова, Роман Евдокимов, Эльдар Калимулин, Виталия Корниенко, Денис Власенко, Роман Курцын, Нелли Уварова, Александр Обласов, а новым Волькой стал Марк Григорьев.

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros
description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

description: Первый взгляд на сериал Гарри Поттер уже здесь, и нам есть что обсудить по тизеру! В обзоре трейлера мы коснемся узнаваемых сцен и каста: удачен ли образ нового Хагрида, как смотрятся Дамблдор и Макгонагалл, и почему Рон Уизли в этой версии может наконец стать глубоким героем. Проанализируем визуальные решения и акцент на камерности помещений, от дома Дурслей до квиддичного поля. Почему музыка в трейлере звучит так типично и когда нам ждать полноценный саундтрек? Кроме того, разберем новости производства сериала от HBO! Это видео поможет вам понять, в каком направлении движется самая ожидаемая адаптация десятилетия.

title: OYUNU BİTİRİYORUM! 😮 | Brawl Stars
tags: brawl star|brawl stars türkçe|brawl stars sıfırdan|brawl stars mega kutu|brawl stars kutu|brawl stars altın|brawl stars gem|brawl stars yeşil taş|brawl stars kupa kasma|brawl stars öğretici|brawl stars oynuyoruz|brawl stars memes|brawl stars oynanış|brawl stars öğreniyoruz|brawl stars 1000 kupa|brawl stars pro|brawl stars türkiye|supercell|brawl stars imparator|bs|imparator yt|imparator brawl stars|kostüm puanlama|edgar|brawl stars|cezalı brawl stars
description:
Oyunubitirenparator :D
Sizi seviyorum❤



Bu videoda brawl starstaki bütün kataloğu ve oyundaki her şeyi satın alıp pro aşama hedefimizi başarmaya çalışıyoruz. Yeni gelen brawl talk çok iyi gözüküyor. Kenji ile sıralamaya kastım ve prestij aldım. Bedava ücretsiz ödül açtım. Kutudan ücretsiz elmas çıktı. Her öldüğümde efsanevi ödüller aldığım videolar çekmeyi seviyorum. En hızlı 50 rütbe maks kademe ve 1000 kupa kasma taktikleri veriyorum.  En kolay kupa kasma taktikleri ni verdim. Buzz ışıkyılı kupa kasma taktikleri. Aşamalı modda kolay şekilde aşama ve  lig atlama taktikleri verdiğim videolar da var. Brawl Stars a sıfırdan başladım daha önce de brawl stars sıfır hesaba kupa kasma serisi çektim ve brawl stars a yeni gelen karakter gigi oynamak istiyorum. Brawl stars ta en iyi kostümler i satın aldım . Brawl Stars kaze , kenji , gigi , ziggy , mina , mortis ve edgar oynamayı seviyorum. Hedefim en iyi brawl stars videoları çekmek ve Türkçe brawl stars videoları çekmek. Diğer videoları kaçırmamak için abone olmayı unutmayın. Takipçilerle abonelerle oyunlar oynuyorum bildirimleri açarsanız ona da katılabilirsiniz. İyi seyirler.  #brawlstars #brawlstar #supercell #brawlpass 

Bu kanalda , brawl stars zengin hesap , brawl stars fakir hesap , brawl stars minigame , brawl stars aşamalı , brawl stars beni öldüren karaktere dönüşüyorum , brawl stars 24 saat boyunca kupa kasma , cezalı brawl stars videoları , brawl stars kutu açılımı , brawl stars taktik , brawl stars kupa kasma , brawl stars yeni karakter , brawl stars her kazandığımda serisi , brawl stars yeni güncelleme , brawl stars dünya rekoru , brawl stars kostüm puanlama , brawl stars hesap puanlama , beni öldüren karaktere dönüşüyorum , brawl stars ceza çarkı , sıfır hesaba 50 rütbe karakter kasıyorum , videoları bulabilirsiniz.

description:
Öncelikle Anomaly President, 3 Ağustos tarihinde çıkıyor. Bunu bir not düşelim. Papa Needs a Headshot ne zaman dersen, ona daha vakit var :D
Sonrasında NVIDIA'nın tartışılan teknolojisine dalıyoruz. Ardından da Crimson Desert ile ilgili bir güncelleme yapıyorum.

► Quadcast 2 S
https://www.hpstore.com.tr/hyperx-quadcast-2-s-rgb-oyuncu-mikrofonu-9a273aa?utm_source=socialmedia&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=enis

https://www.hpstore.com.tr/hyperx-cloud-iii-s-kablosuz-gaming-kulaklik-siyah-kirmizi-a59z0aa?utm_source=socialmedia&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=enis 
► Cloud III S Siyah:
https://www.hpstore.com.tr/hyperx-cloud-iii-s-kablosuz-gaming-kulaklik-siyah-a59yzaa?utm_source=socialmedia&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=enis

Dakikalar:
00:00 Şahane Duran Oyun
01:30 Global Şovda Yer Aldık - Anomaly President Çıkış Tarihi!
03:55 Kerem'in Şahane Fikri
05:13 Anomaly President Fragman Reaksiyonu
06:30 Japonca Fragmanımız
07:15 Sponsor: Hyperx
08:23 En Büyük Korkumuz
09:30 Papa Needs A Headshot Fragman Reaksiyonu
10:44 Etkinlik Sonrası
12:15 Yapay Zeka Kavgası
19:06 DLSS 5 ile İlgili Yeni Detay
21:42 Crimson Desert ile 100 Saat


Tekrardan teşekkürler, sizlerin desteğiyle Anomaly Agent diye bir oyun yapıp çıkarabildik. Şimdi de yeni projelerin heyecanına girebiliyoruz. Bunun için ne kadar teşekkür etsem az. Umarım bu desteğinizin karşılığında ortaya güzel işler koyacağız. Bu Future Games Show içerisinde yer alma işi belki çok büyük bir mevzu gibi gelmeyebilir ama valla benim için çok büyük işti. Görmek gururlandırdı. Umarım daha iyi yerlerde görür daha da gururlarınız :D

İyi seyirler diliyorum!

كلمات الاغنيه 👇🏻

اللعنه اكنها بدات من اول سن العشرين
من يوم ما طفينا شمعتها ومش بنشوف غير ناس ناقصين
كتر خيرهم بسببهم هنروح مستشفي المجانين
مش عارف ليه بنعيط عالميت واحنا العايشين
دا المفروض نفرحله عشان مشي من دنيا البني ادمين 
دنا بدعي اموت ومابزعلش فيوم ماللي يقولي امين


اصل انا جضييييت
مالناس والدنيا انا ع الاحزان ياما نمت صحيت
انا حتت واد غلبان كل طموحه يفتح بيت
اتمني تحلي معايا الشغله يا دنيا ياريييت
وعملت كتييير
مش فاكر حد صاحبته مشفش معايا الخير
ومكنتش عايز حاجه منهم غير التقدير
هو مفيش غيري حيطه مايله اكيد ف بدالي كتييير



كلنا فترات يا مغفل بطل تتعلق بالناس
واجمد كدا دا الجاي اتقل لسه فيه توت ف اعر الكاس
فاكر نفسك فاهم الدنيا دا علي اي وعلي اي اساس
عزز نفسك وابعد علشان نفسك ليها حق عليك
عندك تفسير ليه محدش شالك ولا جه بص عليك
بعد اللي عملته دا كلو ازاي ينسوك ويعدو عليك




مشتاق للموت
٢٥ سنه وانا زي منا عايش فضغووط
مش دا شبابي اللي انا هاتمني ارجعله  المفرود
عيب  اللي بتعمله دنيتي ويايا دا انا مظبوط
مالكون كفرااااان
انا امته راهنت ومره كسبت فعمري رهااان
كل اما بقول علي حد نضيف بطلع غلطااان
كلها شايفين روحها ملايكه وانا اللي شيطااان



طب امته يا زهر هتلعب امته هييجي علينا الدور
نفسي ف تاشيره ل اوروبا وخلص اختام ع الباسبور
او حتي جانوب افريقيا بس اغير عتبه واغووور
امته اخش براندات ومابصش تمن الهودي دا بكام
امته اما يقولو يوم اسمي يقولو بعديه دا رجل الاعمال
امته الشريكات تدفعاي فلوس عشان امضي علي الاعلان



والعب بالكاااش
واسمع فيلا ب ٥٠ مليون واقول يا بلاش
والمباراه اللي اتكون انفيلد مافوتهاش
والعربيه اللي ازهق منها فيوم مركبهاش
والغي المواعيد
واخد طيرتي وسافر عايز ابعد لبعيد
والاقي تركي الشيخ بيرن يهنيني بالعيد
والسوشيال ميديا عليا قاعده تعيد وتزيد



اظاهر كدا ان انتي مايملاش عينك الا تراب
مش معقوله حد يجيب الدنيا لواحده ويبقوا اصحاب
ببرودك ردت فعلك ديما رجعتينا تاني اغراب
حسك متغيره جامد وبقيتي تتاخري ف الseen
والحاله مش مستحمله اهلك اصلا محناش ناقصين
فكك من دور انا جايلي عريس انا من هنا مش مالصين



مابتوحشنييش
وان مره فيوم شفتك انا هعمل معرفكيش
اقسم بلله علي بالي يا نسيوره مابتحيش
فكراني هعيط عليكي لا دا انتي ماتعرفنيش
بدالك فيه كتييييير
يلا ف ٦٠ داهيه انا بعدك فرقت عصير
انا مش ممكن يوم م النتن اللي معاك دا اغير
 دا لا منظر ولا واجهه و هايئه ولا حتي كارير

THE NEW ALBUM OF NONT TANONT
MONO/SPECTRUM
04/11 กลัวลืม (The Collection) - NONT TANONT ft. URBOYTJ

“กลัวลืม (The Collection)” หนึ่งในบทเพลงที่พาดำดิ่งสู่มุมลึกของหัวใจของคนที่ยังคง “ติดอยู่กับอดีต” เรื่องราวของคนที่ไม่อยากลืมทุกช่วงเวลาที่เคยมีร่วมกัน แม้จะรู้ว่าความทรงจำเหล่านั้นอาจเป็นสิ่งที่ทำให้เจ็บปวดที่สุดก็ตาม เมื่อสมองพยายามจะลืม แต่หัวใจกลับยังเลือกที่จะจดจำ เพราะทุกความทรงจำนั้นยังคงงดงามเกินกว่าจะลบเลือนได้

ในพาร์ตดนตรี เพลงนี้โดดเด่นด้วยโทน R&B ที่ผสมผสานกลิ่นอาย lo-fi และ chill hop อย่างลงตัว ด้วยเสียงซินธ์และเบสที่ล่องลอยเคล้ากับจังหวะบีทช้า ๆ สร้างบรรยากาศอบอุ่นปนเศร้า ทำให้เพลงนี้เข้าถึงอารมณ์ผู้ฟังได้อย่างลึกซึ้ง

---------------------------------------­-----------­

วันคืนที่เคยมี กับเวลาของเรา
ไม่เคยเลยจะรางเลือน แม้เป็นเรื่องเก่า
ครั้งแรกที่เจอ ที่ที่พบเธอ
ครั้งแรกที่ได้คุยกัน ยังคงจำได้ทุกคำ

แต่ในสมองของฉันไม่มี
ไม่เคยมีความทรงจำอันนั้น
พยายามจะนึกให้ตายเท่าไร
ไม่อยากจะลืมมันไปง่ายๆ
I’ll take my medicines หวังว่า
สักวันคงหาย

กับเรื่องที่ไม่เคยอยากจะคิดก็ยังคงคิดวนในใจ
แต่เรื่องที่อยากจะจำกลับจำไม่ได้ไม่รู้ต้องทำไง

จริง ๆ แล้วฉันเองที่มันห่วย

ที่เจ็บแทบเกือบตาย

อยากเก็บทุกความทรงจำทุกสิ่งดี ๆ ไม่อยากจะลืมหรือลบมันไป
แต่สักวันนึงสมองของฉัน ที่มันอ่อนแอ ก็คงจะไม่ทำตามหัวใจ

title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer (ซับไทย)
tags: 2026|Anne Hathaway|August 2026|Bad Robot|Christian Convery|Coming Soon|David Robert Mitchell|End Of Oak Street|Ewan McGregor|J.J. Abrams|Maisy Stella|Oak Street|Sci Fi|Warner Bros|คริสเตียน คอนเวอรี|มหาภัยสุดถนนโอ๊ค|ยวน แม็คเกรเกอร์|วิทยาศาสตร์|สิงหาคม|เจ.เจ. เอบรัมส์|เมซี่ สเตลล่า|เร็วๆ นี้|แอนน์ แฮททาเวย์
description:
“บ้านของเรา ย่านของเรา แม้แต่ถนนทั้งสาย... ยังวาร์ปไปหมดแล้ว”
เตรียมพบกับ The End of Oak Street - มหาภัยสุดถนนโอ๊ค 
เข้าฉาย 12 สิงหาคม ในโรงภาพยนตร์เท่านั้น 

#TheEndofOakStreet #มหาภัยสุดถนนโอ๊ค

เมื่อเหตุการณ์ลึกลับจากห้วงอวกาศได้กระชาก "ถนนโอ๊ค" ออกจากย่านชานเมือง และเหวี่ยงชุมชนของพวกเขาไปยังสถานที่ที่ไม่มีใครรู้จัก ครอบครัวแพลตต์จึงได้ค้นพบในไม่ช้าว่า การเอาชีวิตรอดของพวกเขาขึ้นอยู่กับการร่วมแรงร่วมใจกัน เพื่อฝ่าฟันและหาทางออกจากสภาพแวดล้อมที่พวกเขาไม่คุ้นเคย

ภาพยนตร์ "The End of Oak Street - มหาภัยสุดถนนโอ๊ค" นำแสดงโดย แอนน์ แฮททาเวย์ และ ยวน แม็คเกรเกอร์  พร้อมทั้งยังมีนักแสดงอีกมากมายไม่ว่าจะเป็น เมซี่ สเตลล่า และ คริสเตียน คอนเวอรี เขียนบทและกำกับโดย เดวิด โรเบิร์ต มิทเชลล์ โปรดิวเซอร์ เจ.เจ. เอบรัมส์, ฮันนาห์ มิงเกลลา, จอน โคเฮน, เดวิด โรเบิร์ต มิตเชลล์, แมตต์ แจ็คสัน และ ทอมมี่ ฮาร์เปอร์ ผู้อำนวยการสร้างบริหาร คริส เบนเดอร์, เจค ไวเนอร์, โจแอน ลี และ ลีแอนน์ สโตนเบรกเกอร์

มิทเชลล์ ร่วมงานกับทีมงานระดับคุณภาพ ได้แก่ ผู้กำกับภาพ ไมเคิล จิโอลาคิส, ออกแบบงานสร้าง มายา ชิโมกุจิ,
ลำดับภาพ จอห์น แอ็กเซลรัด, ดนตรีประกอบ ไมเคิล จิอัคคิโน, ออกแบบเครื่องแต่งกาย เอริน เบนัค


Warner Bros. Pictures ภูมิใจเสนอ ผลงานจาก A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production และ ภาพยนตร์เดวิด โรเบิร์ต มิทเชลล์ The End of Oak Street - มหาภัยสุดถนนโอ๊ค จัดจำหน่ายทั่วโลกโดย Warner Bros. Pictures

title: พระเอก (Prince Charming) - SERIOUS BACON feat. URBOYTJ [Official MV]
tags: Boxx Music|บ็อกซ์มิวสิค|พระเอก|Prince Charming|SERIOUS BACON|ซีเรียสเบคอน|URBOYTJ|พูดอะไรตั้งมากมาย เธอไม่คิดว่าฉันจะรู้ทัน|ที่จริงเธอแค่จะไปกับเขา|เธอก็แค่จะทิ้งกัน แล้วรีบไปเริ่มใหม่กับเขาที่รออยู่ตรงที่เส้นชัย|พูดอยู่ได้ว่าเธอน่ะเสียใจ พอได้ไหมน้ำตาปลอม ๆ|ทิ้งกันแล้วอยากเป็นพระเอกในหนังที่กำลังจะต้องจบลง|ถ้าไม่รักก็พูดมาตรง ๆ เก็บอารมณ์ซึ้งไปแสดงกับเขาเหอะ|พอเหอะพอ พอคนดี ดีกว่าเธออะไม่มี|ขนาดจะทิ้งกันไป ยังเป็นห่วงกันน่ะพอที|อยากไปซะใจจะขาด โธ่เธอไม่เห็นจะยาก
description:
Something “EXCITING” is gonna happen with SERIOUS BACON !!
 
หลังจากที่ปิด 2nd ALBUM “BEST FRIEND OF THE YEAR” พร้อม Concert ใหญ่ไปเมื่อปีที่แล้ว ต้นปีนี้ SERIOUS BACON กลับมากับ Project ใหม่ อะไรใหม่ ๆ ที่ทุกคนไม่เคยเห็น (SERIOUS BACON เองก็ไม่คิดว่าจะได้เห็นเหมือนกัน) กับ EP. ALBUM “ADD - FRIENDTURE TIME” 5 เพลง กับ 5 ศิลปิน 5 สไตล์เพลง ที่จะโคจรมาเจอกับ SERIOUS BACON ให้แฟนเพลงได้ติดตามกันยาว ๆ ตลอดทั้งปี
 
ประเดิมด้วย Single แรก กับเพลงที่ฟังแล้วอยากส่งให้คนที่ แหมมม~ เป็นคนดีจริง ๆ เลยน้า พ่อพระเอกก กับเพลง “พระเอก (Prince Charming)   - SERIOUS BACON feat. URBOYTJ” การร่วมงานกันครั้งแรกของ SERIOUS BACON และ ซูเปอร์ไซย่าวงการเพลงอย่าง URBOYTJ ถึงแม้จะมีสไตล์ที่ต่างกัน แต่ทั้ง 2 ศิลปินก็ถ่ายทอดอารมณ์ของเพลงนี้ออกมาอย่าง เรียกได้ว่า สนุก แสบ มันส์ ทำถึงสุด ๆ ทั้ง 2 ศิลปิน
ใครกำลังตกอยู่ในสถานการณ์นี้ อย่าลืมแชร์เพลงนี้ไป “แหมมมม พ่อพระเอก!” ไปพร้อมกัน !
_____________________________________

เราต่างก็โตมาจากคนละที่ เรียนรู้ที่จะมีชีวิตกันคนละแบบ
ยินดีกับทุกความเข้ากันได้ด้วยความรัก และทุกเรื่องที่เข้ากันไม่ได้ด้วยความเข้าใจ

อ้อ ฝาก #เสียงจากเหมือนพลอย ในเพลงนี้ด้วยนาา ดีใจที่ชอบนะ :)

ทั้งสองไม่เหมือนกัน แบบนั้นก็เลยต้องเปลี่ยนตัวเองเพื่อหัวใจ

เนื้อเพลง  ออกโอมาหาแหน่

เลิกงานหละเบาะ อ้ายอยากพ่อหน้าเด
ยามใด๋น้อยเวลาสิมาฮอด อ้ายอยากกอด 
ละนอนเฟีนคีงน้อง  สมปองของอ้าย
หวานใจ แม่ละไม ตอนยอน ให้วางงาน เอาไว้สาก่อน
ละมันอยากอ้อน  อ้อน อ้อน นอนเว้า กับเจ้าเด้ นาง

บ่ได้ตั๋ว ปี้นไป  แต่ใจมันเรียกร้อง  อยากให้เธอนั่นมาสนอง ความต้องการของใจ  
มิสไอมิสซิงยูละเจ้าสืฮู้บ้างไหม เลิกงานละไป่ อ้ายสิไปหา

ออกโอมาหาได้บ่ คิดฮอดแท้ นอ หละน้อแก้มปารา
อดใจบ่ได้ แล้วหนาอยากกอดเธอจ๋า สิมาตอนใด๋ 
ให้เจ้ากดรับสายอ้ายแนเด้อ  คั้นได้ยินเสียงเบอร์
ของอ้ายโทรไป  โอที มาเฮ็ดนำอ้าย สิจ่ายค่าแรง เป็น ดะพิเศษ

ออกโอหละมาหาพี่ได้ไหม พอสิได้บาย ได้ขอซูนคีง
สิกอดเจ้า จนว่าแน่นอิ้งติ้ง โอ้ยตีลิงติง พุปิง โสภา
ฃเวลา ละเข้ามาจ้อจั่น ใจอ้ายกะสั่นอยากพ้อแก้วตา

แต่เลือกจะไม่ยอมแพ้มัน

ฟังให้จบ
แล้วมึงจะรู้ว่า…มึงยังไหว

เสียงที่ไม่สวยงาม…แต่จริงที่สุด

title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

ABOUT JUJUTSU KAISEN
Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. One day, to save a classmate who has been attacked by curses, he eats the finger of Ryomen Sukuna, taking the curse into his own soul. From then on, he shares one body with Ryomen Sukuna. title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
